prompt: A single white sneaker floating in a pure white void, macro lens locked-off shot, single overhead key light casting one precise shadow directly below, the product's surface filling two-thirds of frame, ultra-sharp texture detail on stitching and sole, negative space breathing on all sides, clean Apple-ad aesthetic, 16:9. Create this as a simple low-resolution thumbnail-style cinematic still for a prompt library card. Keep the composition clean, readable at small size, realistic, uncluttered, with strong silhouette and clear focal subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage.
negative_prompt: text overlay, UI chrome, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, watermark, logo, illegible details, extra objects, cluttered composition, cartoon, illustration, low-detail mush, deformed product, distorted vehicle, duplicate objects

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage card
settings.camera_angle: match the prompt framing with a single clear subject
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean edges, realistic materials, readable at small size
